---
title: "Hannah More"
---

## Hannah More

**Dates:** (1745-1833)

### Description

writer

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31 [1894]   
- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]
- Letter from July 4th 1889
- Letter from March 26th 1861
- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
